name: Tennessee Department of Economic and Community Development
description_short: Tennessee Department of Economic and Community Development is a credit repair provider based in Nashville, Tennessee. Rated 5.0/5 on Google.
description_long:
Tennessee Department of Economic and Community Development is a credit repair provider serving clients in Nashville, Tennessee. The company serves consumers in the Nashville area who are looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Operating as a corporate office, Tennessee Department of Economic and Community Development provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Nashville, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Tennessee Department of Economic and Community Development operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Nashville, Tennessee area who are considering Tennessee Department of Economic and Community Development should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
